title: ProjectionView
description: The whole rendered fold the canvas loads: TermNodes + SiteNodes + EvidenceEdges + a class summary + gap findings. A pure projection of seed + repo. It must reproduce byte-for-byte from the same committed bytes, so it carries NO timestamp and no non-deterministic field.

source.description: a reminder, in the bytes, that the repo is truth and this is a fold.

class_summary.description: DERIVED: count of terms per class. Must agree with terms[].

$comment: Invalid: any timestamp/random field (breaks reproducibility); class_summary disagreeing with terms; term_count != len(terms); site_count != len(sites). The reproducibility property is the contract: delete it, rebuild it, it is byte-identical.
